nodes.label: CRUD repositories over SQLite connections.  Each repository encapsulates a table
Pages carrying ``tag`` (normalised), ordered by type then path (#189).
``(tag, count)`` ordered by count desc, then tag.
Pages that link TO ``to_page`` (incoming links / impact set).
Full-text search index (FTS5) over page bodies.
Make a free-form query safe for FTS5 MATCH.          FTS5 uses a rich query synt
Collapse a raw-markdown snippet to a single whitespace-normalised line.
Return (path, title, rank) sorted by relevance (bm25, lower = better).
Like :meth:`search` but also returns an FTS5 highlight snippet (#171).
Mark a job as cancelled (terminal, not an error).
Record a coarse progress step for a running job (best-effort).
Persist the streamed answer-so-far for SSE delta emission (#191).
Flag a job for cooperative cancellation (read by the running agent).
Append-only event log for a job's live progress (#272).      One row per discret
Append one event; returns its row id. Best-effort (retries on lock).
Events for ``job_id`` with id greater than ``after_id`` (chronological).
Last ``limit`` (question, answer) turns of a conversation, oldest first.
Per-brain key/value bookkeeping (e.g. the curator's last run time, #41).
